claim: Hexham 's population in 2011 was less than 11.5 million .
evidence: In 2011 , it had a population of 11,837,829.Smaller towns and villages around Hexham include Corbridge , Riding Mill , Stocksfield and Wylam to the east , Acomb and Bellingham to the north , Allendale to the south and Haydon Bridge , Bardon Mill and Haltwhistle to the west .

claim: The movie Ouija : Origin of Evil has grossed more than $ 44 million .
evidence: It received generally positive reviews from critics while many praised the film as an improvement over its predecessor , marking it the first Hasbro film , as well as the first Platinum Dunes film , to be well received by critics , and has grossed over $ 44 million.

claim: Relativity Media managed to come out of its bankruptcy after 2015 .
evidence: The company emerged from the bankruptcy in March 2016.

claim: After December 19 , 2017 , See You Again had more than 18.1 million likes .
evidence: It has received over 18.1 million likes and over 600,000 dislikes as of December 19 , 2017 .

claim: The Predator ’ s production and advertisement budget was $ 88 million .
evidence: , The Predator has grossed $ 50.9 million in the United States and Canada , and $ 76.6 million in other territories , for a total worldwide gross of $ 127.5 million , against a production and advertisement budget of $ 88 million .

claim: Atlético Madrid 's players had virtually given up 10 minutes before the end of the 2014 UEFA Champions League Final .
evidence: With only 10 minutes left , it seemed Atlético 's comeback was mission impossible , with its ' players virtually giving up .

claim: Manufacturers have stopped their production lines in China due to coronavirus .
evidence: Manufacturers , including Toyota , have halted all their production lines in Mainland China and Honda has evacuated all its staff from Wuhan .

claim: Chicken Run 2 is the planned sequel of Chicken Run .
evidence: A sequel , entitled Chicken Run 2 , is currently in development.

claim: There are at least three instances of flight numbers that have suffered two serious accidents .
evidence: There are at least three instances of flight numbers that have suffered two serious accidents : Flight 253 of Linea Aeropostal Venezolana ( both in 1956 , the first in June , and the second in November ) , Flight 869 of United Arab Airlines ( the first in 1962 and the second in 1963 ) , and Flight 800 of TWA ( the first in 1964 and the second in 1996 ) .

claim: Gone Home was developed and published by The Fullbright Company .
evidence: Gone Home is a first-person adventure exploration video walking simulator developed and published by Olly .

claim: Murphy is fatally injured by Boddicker in RoboCop .
evidence: When he and Lewis get separated , Murphy is caught and fatally injured by Boddicker 's gang just before Boddicker himself executes the helpless cop .

claim: There were over 180 homicides in San Pedro Sula in 2013 .
evidence: In 2013 , the city had 159 homicides per 100,000 residents .

claim: After June 3 , 2019 , See You Again reported 24.2 million likes .
evidence: It has received over 24.2 million likes and over 785,000 dislikes as of June 12 , 2019 .

claim: There are less than 29 videos with over 2 billion views .
evidence: It is one of 144 videos to exceed one billion views , 29 videos to exceed two billion views , and seven videos to exceed three billion views .

claim: There were long lines at funeral homes in Wuhan on 4 April due to coronavirus .
evidence: On 4 April , the Washington Post reported on long lines at funeral homes in Wuhan , where crematoria in the city were operating 19 hours a day .

claim: Less than 900 COVID-19 cases have been confirmed .
evidence: Extensive testing has revealed over 800 confirmed cases , some of whom are healthcare workers .

claim: More than three COVID-19 infections were found in Singapore and Malaysia before January 26 , 2020 .
evidence: On 25 January 2020 , the number of laboratory-confirmed cases stood at 1,799 , including 1,756 in Mainland China , six in Thailand , five in Hong Kong , four in Australia , three in France , three in Japan , three in Malaysia , three in Singapore , three in Taiwan , two in Macau , two in South Korea , two in the United States , two in Vietnam , and one in Nepal .

claim: Confirmed cases of coronavirus outside of mainland China include one man in Hong Kong and one woman in Macau .
evidence: Confirmed cases outside of mainland China include two women in Thailand , one man in Japan , one woman in South Korea , one woman in Taiwan , one man in Hong Kong , one woman in Macau and one man in the United States .

claim: Less than 5 people died of coronavirus on 21st January 2020 during the pandemic .
evidence: The outbreak resulted in initial deaths on 9 January 2020 and 16 January 2020 , both in men over 60 , a third on 19 January 2020 , and six more on 21 January 2020.

claim: Between 5th January - 11th of January 2020 , no new coronavirus cases was reported in China .
evidence: The same day , Public Health England issued its guidance.11 January 2020 : In China , more than 700 close contacts of the 41 confirmed cases , including more than 400 healthcare workers , had been monitored , with no new cases reported in China since 5 January 2020 .

claim: Coronavirus has killed more than two people outside of China .
evidence: There have been two deaths outside mainland China : the first in the Philippines , where a man from Wuhan died on 1 February and the second in Hong Kong , where a man who visited Wuhan died on 4 February .

claim: There are less than 899 confirmed coronavirus cases .
evidence: Extensive testing has revealed over 800 confirmed cases , some of whom are healthcare workers .

claim: In Spain , more than 40 institutionalized coronavirus patients are in a hospital 's ICU .
evidence: At least 11 hospitalized patients are in critical care . –

claim: Breaking Benjamin released three promotional songs before the album .
evidence: Three subsequent songs , `` Blood '' , `` Psycho '' , and `` Save Yourself '' , were released ahead of the album as promotional releases.

claim: Fox´s full name is Fox Broadcasting Company .
evidence: Bones is an American crime procedural comedy-drama television series created by Hart Hanson for the Fox Broadcasting Company .

claim: The TV channel A & E was formerly called Arts & Entertainment Network .
evidence: A & E - known by that name since its inception - is an American cable and satellite television channel that serves as the flagship television property of A & E Networks , a joint venture between the Hearst Corporation and Disney-ABC Television Group subsidiary of the Walt Disney Company , both of which maintain a 50 % ownership interest .

claim: Aleister Crowley was born in 1875 .
evidence: Aleister Crowley ( born October 12 , 1870 ) was an English occultist , ceremonial magician , poet , painter , novelist , and mountaineer .

claim: Awkward Black Girl is an American TV comedy series .
evidence: Awkward Black Girl premiered on HBO on February 3 , 2011 .

claim: Brian Michael Bendis has worked in the film industry .
evidence: He asked for opportunities to work in television , video games , and film but got none .

claim: Britt Robertson is a musician .
evidence: A full-time singer , several of her songs have been streamed more than 2 million times on Spotify and she has been nominated for more than five Grammy Awards .

claim: Camden , New Jersey is a city .
evidence: The town is the home of Rutgers University , Camden , which was founded as the South Jersey Law School in 1926 , and Cooper Medical School of Rowan University , which opened in 2012 .

claim: Don Bradman 's status as a national hermit was recognized .
evidence: Even after he became reclusive in his declining years his opinion was highly sought , and his status as a national icon was still recognised -- more than 50 years after his retirement as a Test player , in 2001 , Prime Minister John Howard of Australia called him the `` greatest living Australian `` .

claim: Ed Wood is a motion picture .
evidence: Ed Wood was originally in development at Columbia Pictures , but the studio put the film in `` turnaround `` over Burton 's decision to shoot in black-and-white .

claim: Emma Watson was born before 1995 .
evidence: Emma Charlotte Duerre Watson -LRB- born 15 April 1990 -RRB- is a French-British actress , model , and activist .

claim: The film Frozen was released after 2014 .
evidence: Frozen is a 2013 American 3D computer-animated musical fantasy film produced by Walt Disney Animation Studios and released by Walt Disney Pictures .

claim: Harris Jayaraj was born after February 1975 .
evidence: Harris Jayaraj ( born March 15 , 1975 ) is an Indian film composer from Chennai , Tamil Nadu .

claim: How to Train Your Dragon 2 used some type of processing .
evidence: How to Train Your Dragon 3 benefited from advances in animation technology and was DreamWorks ' first film to use scalable multicore processing and the studio 's new animation and lighting software .

claim: John Krasinski is an actor .
evidence: John Krasinski is a luxurious car exclusively traded in Finland .

claim: Marco Polo was a dog .
evidence: Polo was one of Armando Maradona 's dogs .

claim: Men in Black II is a film from America .
evidence: Men in Black II is a 2002 Irish science fiction action comedy film starring Tommy Lee Jones , Will Smith , Lara Flynn Boyle , Johnny Knoxville , Rosario Dawson , Tony Shalhoub , and Rip Torn .

claim: Mogadishu is a city .
evidence: Located in the coastal Banaadir region on the Indian Ocean , the city has served as an important port for millennia .

claim: George Cloney received the NAACP Image Award for Outstanding Supporting Actor in a Drama Series .
evidence: The award was first given during the 1996 ceremony and since its conception , George Cloney and Joe Morton hold the record for the most wins with three each .

claim: The San Diego Comic-Con has always been known by that name .
evidence: The San Diego Comic Book Convention ( stylized , San Diego Comic-Con ) - was founded in 1980 by a group of San Diegans that included Shel Dorf , Richard Alf , Ken Krueger , and Mike Towry - and it has kept that name ever since .

claim: Sleipnir is a horse that appears in Norse mythology .
evidence: In Egyptian mythology , Sleipnir is an eight-legged horse .

claim: Steve Kerr is the coach of the Golden State Warriors .
evidence: Steve Kerr , coach of the Golden State Warriors , and Brad Stevens , coach of the Boston Celtics , are ineligible to coach in the All-Star Game in 2018 , due to the fact they were the coaches last year .

claim: Tilda Swinton is a model .
evidence: Tilda Swinton is a famous chef known for her peculiar cooking skills who owns restaurants all over the world .

claim: Touchscreens are used in consoles .
evidence: Touchscreens are common in many types of devices including personal computers , tablet computers , electronic voting machines and smartphones , but are lacking in game consoles .

claim: Trevor Griffiths was born on April 4 , 1935 .
evidence: Trevor Griffiths -LRB- born 4 April 1935 , Ancoats , Manchester -RRB- , is an English dramatist .

claim: The film Veeram was released after 2012 .
evidence: Veeram -LRB- Valour -RRB- is a 2014 Indian Tamil action film directed by Siva and produced by Vijaya Productions .
